reviews.comment:
Compre sándwiches de salame y queso más un jugo Baggio $8800, me pareció un poco caro pero lo peor es que estaban vencidos, al cambiarlos me cuestionaron si tenían gusto feo o no. Al final me los cambiaron por un pebete pero no estaba rico. Además no pude pagar con la App YPF. Y a los sanitarios les faltaba higiene.

(Translated by Google)
I bought salami and cheese sandwiches plus a Baggio juice for $8800. I thought it was a bit expensive, but the worst part was that they were expired. When I tried to exchange them, they questioned whether they tasted bad or not. In the end, they replaced them with a pebete (a type of sandwich), but it wasn't good. Also, I couldn't pay with the YPF app. And the restrooms weren't very clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURQc18tSXhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hace 5 años que vamos a Villa Nueva, Córdoba, y siempre hacemos nuestra última parada acá, la atención del muchacho y la chica del minisuper es excelente, los sanguchitos de cocido, salame riquísimos, y más si le untan manteca, los recomiendo, el café con leche riquísimo, da gusto parar un rato y más charlar con ellos que son muy buena onda, muy atentos, éxitos chicos 🫶🏼

(Translated by Google)
We've been going to Villa Nueva, Córdoba, for 5 years now, and we always make our last stop here. The service from the young man and woman at the mini-supermarket is excellent. The stew and salami sandwiches are delicious, and even more so if they spread butter on them. I recommend them. The coffee with milk is delicious. It's a pleasure to stop for a while and even more so to chat with them, they're very cool and attentive. Good luck, guys 🫶🏼

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias Ivana por su visita y puntuación.
